title: CustomSDFCallbackEventHandler Object
description: API clients can implement subclasses of this handler to enable custom Signed Distance Field geometries.

methods.name: boundingBox
methods.description: This method should be implemented in the subclass of the handler to return the bounding box of the Signed Distance Field that it can provide. This method will be called infrequently by the system.

methods.name: signedDistanceAt
methods.description: This method should be implemented in the subclass of the handler to return the Signed Distance value at the given coordinates within the bounding box. This method will be called very frequently and potentially from several differrent threads, it should be made as fast as possible

boundingBox.title: CustomSDFCallbackEventHandler.boundingBox Method
boundingBox.description: This method should be implemented in the subclass of the handler to return the bounding box of the Signed Distance Field that it can provide. This method will be called infrequently by the system.
boundingBox.return_description: True if there is a valid bounding box.

parameters.name: bboxOut
parameters.description: This is a return parameter. The values of this should be set by the client implementation.

signedDistanceAt.title: CustomSDFCallbackEventHandler.signedDistanceAt Method
signedDistanceAt.description: This method should be implemented in the subclass of the handler to return the Signed Distance value at the given coordinates within the bounding box. This method will be called very frequently and potentially from several differrent threads, it should be made as fast as possible
signedDistanceAt.return_description: The signed distance value at the sampled point (X,Y,Z).

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the sampled point.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of the sampled point.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: Z coordinate of the sampled point.
